summary: Comprehensive testing of SOHO Hotel Systems Management Platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend mostly working with one minor UI interaction issue in ticket creation modal.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options in ticket type selector not clickable within modal dialog
ui_bugs.selector: ticket type dropdown in create ticket modal
ui_bugs.details: The shadcn Select component options are rendered but have interaction issues when clicking specific options like 'Hardware'. May be z-index or pointer events issue.

passed_tests: Frontend login page load and functionality
Dashboard metrics display (3 tickets abiertos, 1 Propuesta nueva, 1 proyecto activo)
Tickets page navigation and list display
Suggestions page with status tabs working
Suggestions status filtering (Todas, Nuevas, En estudio, etc.)
Admin pages access (Users, Hotels, Departments, Ticket Types)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown selection in ticket creation modal - the shadcn Select component options are not properly clickable within modal dialogs. Consider adjusting z-index or pointer events for dropdown options.
